title: Senior Scientist (AFST/PCP), SIMTech
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We are seeking a motivated individual to fill the position of Research Scientist in the Integrated Composite Processing Section. This position requires the applicant to lead and conduct research in advanced fibre-reinforced composites forming and moulding technology, study and characterization of composite structures. The scientist is required to support both industry and R&D projects where process innovation, structural testing and material characterizations are needed. Experience in project management, grant writing and patent applications will be advantageous. Basic knowledge of material circularity, CAD design, finite-element analysis and algorithm development is required.

JOB DESCRIPTION

  • Research on advanced short-fibre reinforced thermoplastic composites in multiple material systems.
  • Working with a team of scientists and engineers to enhance the capability of compression moulding technology.
  • Formulate scientific research direction and innovative proposals to secure competitive funding.
  • Understand the advanced manufacturing domain and provide innovative solutions to industry problems in the area.
  • Familiar with CAD and CAE tools, SolidWorks, etc.
  • Deep knowledge of a wide range of forming technologies of metal, composites, and polymer materials
  • Conduct mechanical tests, testing tool/jig design and material characterizations
  • Develop and test innovative solutions to optimize composite compression moulding process technologies
  • Prepare project progress update presentation for customers
  • Prepare research project proposals, presentations, and reports, conduct R&D experiments and file technology disclosures
  • Support in the process equipment set-up, laboratory operations, and inventory management for export control items
  • Keep a good record of production work orders, laboratory data, methods, results, drawings, etc
  • Able to perform well in both industry-type and research-type projects

JOB REQUIREMENT

  • Ph.D. in Aerospace/ Mechanical/ Material Science Engineering, etc.
  • Candidates with strong fundamentals in material science and mechanical engineering are welcome
  • Experienced with composite moulding machine operations and process troubleshooting
  • Good track record of scientific publications in top journals and conferences

We value the following soft skills:

  • Excellent technical presentation and scientific writing skills
  • Can-do attitude and ability to work with different needs of various stakeholders
  • Proactive team player and technically motivated to solve problems and discover new research topics.
  • Competent in the use of 3D modelling, process simulation and FE structural analysis will be a bonus
  • Meticulous, fine attention to detail and technically inclined towards process and laboratory work.
  • Willing to learn new skills.
  • Comfortable with customer/vendor interactions and handling project negotiations
